## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- Worker URL: [e.g., https://your-worker.workers.dev]
- Subscription URL: [if applicable, obscure sensitive parts]
- Target Format: [clash/surge/json]
- Browser: [if relevant]
- Date/Time: [when did this occur]

```bash
# Provide a curl command to reproduce (remove sensitive data)
curl "https://your-worker.workers.dev/?url=...&target=..."
```

// Paste any error messages here

## Additional Context
